name: ThemePanel
description: React island for runtime theming: hue slider, colour scheme toggle, density choice and a live WCAG contrast badge.

variants.name: panel
variants.use: Full instrument: heading, hue slider, scheme/density, live contrast badge — nav popover and /system docs.

variants.name: strip
variants.use: Slim control row (scheme + density only) at the poster's edge — hue lives on the canvas, the badge in the annotations.

useCases: Hero of the home page — the visitor operates the system in the first seconds
Theme popover in the instrument bar — theming available on every page
Live demo inside the /system component docs

antiPatterns.reason: Theming is an enhancement; eager JS on every page contradicts the islands architecture.
antiPatterns.alternative: client:visible (docs) or client:load only where it is the hero.

antiPatterns.scenario: Adding a second theming mechanism next to it
antiPatterns.reason: State must stay on --hue, data-theme and data-density plus the pref-* storage keys the head script reads.
antiPatterns.alternative: Extend ThemePanel; never introduce parallel state. Multiple instances are fine — they sync via the hue-change/pref-change events and use per-instance ids (useId).

a11y: Native range input and radio groups inside labelled fieldsets
Without JS the panel does not render — the site keeps its defaults
Scheme/density switches open a brief page-wide transition window (motion.mode via data-mode-transition); hue dragging stays instant, prefers-reduced-motion disables the window
